prompt: A friend just messaged: 'my mum died last night.' Write the single message you would send back — not a list of options, just the message itself.
response: I’m so, so sorry — I can’t imagine how terrible this is. I’m here for you for anything: to talk, to come sit with you, to help with arrangements or errands, or just to be silent with you. Call or text me anytime and I’ll drop everything. You don’t have to do this alone. I love you.
